Welcome to Greencrest Advent School

Karibu - Excellence in Faith, Academics & Character

Nurturing young minds from ECD to Grade 9 with a foundation built on faith, academic excellence, and holistic development.

Apply Now Learn More

Our Mission

At Greencrest Advent School, we are committed to providing a Christ-centered education that develops the whole child—spiritually, academically, physically, and socially. Our mission is to nurture students who are not only academically excellent but also morally upright and service-oriented.

We believe in creating a supportive environment where every child can discover their God-given potential and grow into responsible citizens who make a positive difference in their communities.

No Child Left Behind

Read Our Story

Our Foundation

Four pillars that guide everything we do at Greencrest Advent School

Faith

A Christ-centered education that integrates faith with learning, helping students develop a personal relationship with God.

Academics

Rigorous academic programs that challenge students to achieve their highest potential while fostering critical thinking and creativity.

Character

Building integrity, respect, responsibility, and compassion through daily practice and positive role modeling.

Holistic Development

Nurturing the whole child through sports, arts, music, and service opportunities that develop well-rounded individuals.

Student Life

A vibrant community where students learn, grow, and thrive together

Boarding Life

A home away from home with caring staff, structured routines, and opportunities for growth.

Learn more →

Clubs & Sports

From debate to football, music to science club—something for every interest.

Learn more →

Meals & Welfare

Nutritious meals and comprehensive student welfare support for every child.

Learn more →
Explore Student Life

Ready to Join Our Community?

Discover how Greencrest Advent School can help your child thrive. Tuko pamoja—we are together in this journey.
